nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联114种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等114种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Okinawa rail
nodes.summary: Okinawa rail（Okinawa rail，学名 Gallirallus okinawae），分类上属于鹤形目，并归入秧鸡科，在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要分布于森林，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、外来捕食者、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 鹤形目
nodes.summary: 鹤形目（Gruiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联126种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、灰冠鹤、Grey-winged trumpeter等126种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 秧鸡科
nodes.summary: 秧鸡科（Rallidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Tsingy forest rail、Madagascar forest rail、Chestnut forest rail等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联42种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等42种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in subtropical moist forests and in neighboring habitats

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In winter, some birds move lower down or move a little further south of the breeding range. It mainly occurs in evergreen broad-leaved forest but also occurs in marshes, grassland and cultivated land close to forested areas and water

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In winter, some birds move lower down or move a little further south of the breeding range. It mainly occurs in evergreen broad-leaved forest but also occurs in marshes, grassland and cultivated land close to forested areas and water

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is classified as an endangered species and is threatened by habitat loss and introduced predators

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is classified as an endangered species and is threatened by habitat loss and introduced predators

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Downloaded on 15 October 2008. It is threatened by the loss and fragmentation of its forest habitat due to logging, agriculture and the building of roads, dams and golf courses

links.label: 属于
